scripts.bench:compare: pnpm run bench:compare:data && pnpm run bench:harness:assets && pnpm run bench:harness:build && node wasm-bench/run-compare.cjs
scripts.bench:compare:open: pnpm run bench:compare:data && pnpm run bench:harness:assets && env -u NO_COLOR trunk serve --config wasm-bench/harness/Trunk.toml
